Jesus heals on the Sabbath day-He chooses and ordains the Twelve Apostles-He asks: Can Satan cast out Satan?-Jesus speaks of blasphemy against the Holy Ghost, and identifies those who believe as his family.

_It Will Continue_--All is right. God can carry on his own work.
This Kingdom will stand forever. 8:69.

"And thus did I, the Lord God, appoint unto man the days of his probation-that by his natural death he might be raised in immortality unto eternal life, even as many as would believe; And they that believe not unto eternal damnation; for they cannot be redeemed from their spiritual fall, because they repent not; for they love darkness rather than…
"Eternal damnation" could have been translated "everlasting sin."

After the clean had emerged out of the unclean, whatever was allied to the unclean spirit fled. So now the Holy Spirit obtained dominion, and the unclean spirit was subjugated utterly. The latter received its punishment without the camp in harmony with the precept,
Mark 1:21-27-casts out an unclean spirit that testified Jesus was the Son of God
